idea-plugin.name: Supersigil
idea-plugin.description:
Supersigil treats specification documents as code. This plugin connects to the supersigil-lsp language server to give you real-time feedback, navigation, and rich previews for Supersigil spec files.

Features

  • Diagnostics: parse errors, broken cross-references, duplicate IDs, circular dependencies, coverage gaps, and staleness warnings as you edit.
  • Go to definition: follow refs, implements, and depends links between spec documents.
  • Autocomplete: document IDs, criterion IDs, and component attributes.
  • Hover: document metadata and clickable links.
  • Code actions: quick fixes for missing attributes, duplicate IDs, broken references, and more.
  • Spec Explorer: a tool window that organizes specs by project, ID prefix, and document with type and status indicators.
  • Graph Explorer: an interactive graph visualization of spec relationships with filtering and navigation capabilities.
  • Markdown preview: supersigil-xml fences render as rich components with verification status, collapsible evidence lists, and clickable navigation links.
  • Verify action: run cross-document verification from the Tools menu.

Requirements

The supersigil-lsp binary must be available on $PATH, in ~/.cargo/bin, or in ~/.local/bin. A custom path can be configured under Settings → Tools → Supersigil.
